description_long: This is a red plastic squeeze bottle with a green ribbed nozzle cap, commonly used for dispensing sauces. The front features a white rooster logo and bold white text reading 'SRIRACHA HOT CHILI SAUCE,' along with additional product information. The bottle has a contoured shape for easy gripping and a slightly translucent body, allowing some visibility of the contents inside. The back and sides display nutritional information and barcodes in white print. The cap is pointed and designed for controlled pouring or squirting. The overall appearance is clean, with no visible damage or wear.
description: A red plastic squeeze bottle with a green nozzle cap, white branding, and a contoured grip, typically used for hot chili sauce.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white rooster logo, 'SRIRACHA HOT CHILI SAUCE' text, and green nozzle cap.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing nutritional information and barcode details in white print, with the green cap visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more nutritional and product information, with the bottle's contoured shape and cap.
description_view_3: Right side view showing additional white text and the bottle's ergonomic grip, with the green cap in profile.
attribute_label_or_branding: White rooster logo and 'SRIRACHA HOT CHILI SAUCE' text on the front, with additional white nutritional and product information on the sides and back.
